LH La Hacienda Mexican Restaurant ABOUT MENU CONTACT MORE ▾ Home About Menu News Contact OPENS IN 30 MIN ☰ View Menu Menu highlights and popular favorites Start with tacos, burritos, tortas, specials, and the favorites local guests mention most. Prices can change, so call to confirm tonight’s menu. TACOS Street taco standouts Carne Asada $3.95 Broiled skirt steak. Carnitas $3.95 Fried pork. Chorizo $3.95 Mexican sausage. Al Pastor $3.95 Roasted pork. BURRITOS Large-format favorites Regular Burrito $8.99 Rice, beans, lettuce, cheese, and your choice of protein. Burrito Combination $9.99 Two-meat combination burrito. Huevos con Carne Asada $8.99 Eggs and steak burrito variation. Burrito con Papas $8.25 Potato burrito. TORTAS Mexican-style sandwiches Chorizo con Huevo $9.50 Mexican sausage with eggs. Carne Asada con Huevo $9.50 Steak with eggs. Pechuga a la Plancha $9.99 Chicken breast on the griddle. Cubana $12.00 Breaded steak, ham, chorizo, eggs, and no lettuce. SPECIALS Specials and bigger plates Everyday Special $11.75 Two regular tacos or one regular burrito with fries and a canned drink. Monday Special $12.50 Two gorditas with rice, beans, and a regular drink. Thursday Special $19.99 Three regular tortas. Parrillada See menu Shrimp, chicken, and steak platter for two or three with quesadillas and guacamole. LOCAL GUEST NOTES Why people come back ★★★★★ “Rey Cardenas calls burritos and tortas a favorite pick-me-up and specifically points to the green salsa.” Rey Cardenas GOOGLE REVIEW, 4-YEAR REGULAR ★★★★★ “Tiffany V says service was great and quick, and the asada and carnitas tacos were delicious.” Tiffany V GOOGLE REVIEW, DINNER VISIT ★★★★★ “Kick describes 25 years of visits and calls out chips and salsa, al pastor, pico de gallo, and consistency.” Kick GOOGLE REVIEW, 25-YEAR REGULAR TAKE ACTION Call, map, menu, or order in one tap Use the fastest path for tonight: call the restaurant, open directions, view the full menu, or start an online pickup order.
